data.title: Justin Sun responded to the WLFI blacklist incident: Only a small amount of recharge testing was carried out and it would not affect the market
data.description: In response to World Liberty Financial (WLFI) blacklisting its related addresses, Justin Sun said that his address had only been used for a small amount of exchange deposit testing, the amount was very low, and the address was subsequently dispersed. It was not involved in any buying and selling activities, so it was impossible to have an impact on the market.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 850 USDT with a 0.92% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 05, 2025, 18:31 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 850 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 850.070007 USDT, with a narrowed 0.92% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: WLFI blacklisted Sun Yuchen’s address, involving approximately 2.94 billion locked tokens
data.description: According to on-chain information, World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has blacklisted addresses associated with Justin Sun, involving approximately 540 million unlocked tokens and 2.4 billion locked tokens. The project owner stated that they suspect that some trading platforms are using user tokens to sell off, thereby suppressing the token price.

data.title: India reaffirms commitment to Russia friendship as Trump blasts their ties to ‘darkest China’
data.description:

The Asian giant reiterated pointedly that it will keep buying Russian oil because it’s cheaper, ignoring U. S. pressure and the 50% import tariff imposed by President Donald […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-reaffirms-commitment-to-russia/

data.title: Dark web vendors distribute fake Ledger wallet pages targeting crypto users
data.description:
SOCRadar Dark Web Team detected threat actors distributing phishing tools that impersonate Ledger hardware wallet interfaces to allegedly steal crypto from unsuspecting users. According to a Sept. 1 report, the cybercriminals advertise a “Ledger Wallet 2025 Smart Scampage Inferno Multichain” kit that replicates the official Ledger interface with professional design elements
source: https://cryptoslate.com/dark-web-vendors-distribute-fake-ledger-wallet-pages-targeting-crypto-users/

data.title: Singapore bonds defy global selloff as rest of the world bleeds
data.description:
The global bond market is getting hammered. Long-dated government bonds everywhere are being dumped by investors, sending yields soaring. But Singapore? The place is doing the exact opposite. While others bleed, Singapore’s bonds are holding up like a goddamn fortress. Yields on 30-year debt this year have jumped around 45 basis points in the UK, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/singapore-bonds-defy-global-selloff/

data.title: Tether CEO: The previously minted 2 billion USDT was swapped with other chains
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino responded to Tether's minting of 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum chain in a post on the X platform. He said that Binance has swapped 2 billion USDT from the Tron chain to 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation News: Fed Sets Stablecoin Showdown and Spot Trading Gains Momentum
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-news-fed-sets-stablecoin-showdown-trump-family-crypto-bet-and-spot-trading-gains-momentum/
